summary: Recognition (Shoutout) Enhancement and Floor Events Fix - All 15 backend tests PASSED. Recognition participants endpoint returns searchable list of all users. Shoutouts with recipient_id properly create notifications. Floor events are correctly visible to students on same floor.

minor.issue: FloorEventCreate model requires 'floor' field but backend uses current_user.floor. Model should make floor Optional since it's overwritten by backend.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update FloorEventCreate model to make 'floor' field Optional[str] = None since backend sets it from current_user.floor
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/recognition/participants - Works correctly, returns id, name, email, role, floor. Search filter works.
POST /api/shoutouts - Correctly stores both to_user_id and recipient notification. sender_name and recipient_name fields populated.
GET /api/notifications - Recipients correctly receive shoutout notifications with title 'You were recognized by {sender}!'
POST /api/floor-events - RA role check works (403 for students). Events created with correct floor assignment.
GET /api/floor-events - Students see RA-created events on same floor. Floor filtering works correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users in TEST6991 tenant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recognition/Shoutout enhancement fully working. Floor events fix verified - students see RA-created events on same floor. Rate limit is 5 logins/minute - use token caching in tests. FloorEventCreate model requires 'floor' field even though backend overwrites it.

recognition_participants.notes: Returns all active users with id, name, email, role, floor. Search by name/email works.

shoutouts_with_recipient.notes: Accepts to_user_id/recipient_id. Stores sender_name and recipient_name. Sends notification to recipient.

shoutout_notifications.notes: Recipients see shoutout notifications with type='shoutout' and title mentioning recognition.

floor_events_creation.notes: RAs can create events (200). Students get 403. Events assigned to user's floor.

floor_events_visibility.notes: Students see RA-created events on their floor. Floor filtering works correctly.
